description: Fitz finishes the design for Aida’s body-generating machine and discusses the implications with her. He expresses a desire to join her on the 'other side.' This marks his full commitment to Hydra's cause inside the Framework and underscores the existential danger posed by Aida's plan.
location: Framework (virtual reality simulation / Dr. Radcliffe / Aida construct)

transcript.line: It's done, Ophelia. I've completed the design. You won't have to live like this for much longer. I had my doubts about the project, but I finally see it. Your new body will be stronger. That's who you were meant to be. I just have one request. Take me with you.
